hawkish_phrases: inflation had picked up, although the increase was expected to be mostly temporary
risks to the inflation outlook...were widely regarded as increasingly tilted to the upside
profit margins had already been squeezed for some time...such a continuous decline in margins was not sustainable and would likely reverse
supply bottlenecks now seemed to be more severe and persisting for longer than previously expected
residential property prices in the euro area were increasing at their fastest pace since 2007
dovish_phrases: the key ECB interest rates to remain at their present or lower levels until we see inflation reaching two per cent well ahead of the end of our projection horizon and on a durable basis
underlying price pressures had remained subdued
inflation over the medium term remained subdued
wage developments had been subdued overall
the outlook for inflation over the medium term remains subdued
summary: The ECB held rates at present levels and recalibrated forward guidance on interest rates to incorporate the new symmetric two per cent inflation target and a conditional commitment on the lower bound, with unanimous agreement on the new strategy but a few members expressing reservations about the forward guidance, signalling a clear easing bias despite inflation having picked up temporarily.
